Author: rail
Name: Aether Blackbox
Punchline: A visual replay of positions before death
Description: Replay positions and events before death. /abb to open. Connects to an external websocket relay for opt-in live sync mode (no PII sent).

v1.0.1: image fix
v1.0.0:stable release, crash fixes
v0.0.0.4:savage bg, replay saving bug fixed
v0.0.0.3:session delete option, entities togglw working
v0.0.0.2:code clean up, time display change
v0.0.0.1: Initial release
